creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 255033
Patch to depend on devel/onetbb

Hello Yuri,

The attached patch seems to be enough to enable misc/openmvg to build with devel/onetbb instead of old devel/tbb port.

Could you check it please ? And, if it's OK, either approve or commit it ?

Thanks in advance,

Ganael.
